children.text: Card A — Full Pipeline: API Chain + Response Reading

Runs graphql → branch → REST GET → REST POST (body from GQL result) → updateCollection → executeComponentAction → whileLoop → forEach → multiOptionBranch → passThroughCondition. Every branch and loop type is covered.

children.text: Card D — Event Object by Trigger Type

Each trigger produces a different event shape. Interact with each element to see what event fields are captured: change→{value}, click→{x,y,button}, enterKey→{key,value}, focus/blur→{value}, scroll→{scrollTop,scrollLeft}, valueChange→{value}, checkbox change→{value:boolean}.
